home.title: Blen
home.subtitleLine1: AI understands your personality in depth,
home.subtitleLine2: and helps you find your most compatible match.
home.previewSubtitle: Preview the connection that fits you best

about.title: About Blen
about.description: Blen is an AI-powered matching platform designed to help people find meaningful connections based on who they truly are.
about.missionIntro: We believe that meaningful relationships start with understanding.
about.missionBody: Our mission is to use AI to deeply understand each individual's personality, values, and lifestyle - and connect them with the most compatible person.
about.whatWeDoBody: Blen analyzes user responses through AI to generate personalized insights and matching recommendations.

serviceIncludes.experience: A more intentional and thoughtful matching experience

about.approachIntro: Unlike traditional dating platforms that rely on swipes and appearances, Blen focuses on deeper compatibility.
about.approachGoal: Our goal is to move beyond superficial matching and create real, meaningful connections.
about.importantNoteBody: Blen provides AI-generated insights and match recommendations for reference purposes only. We do not guarantee relationship outcomes or compatibility accuracy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Last Updated: April 22, 2026
terms.intro1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern the use of the AI-based matching service provided by Blen ("Service").
terms.intro2: By signing up or using the Service, you agree to these Terms.

section1.title: 1. Purpose of Service
section1.body1: Blen provides AI-based matching recommendations by analyzing users' personality, values, and lifestyle.
section1.note: AI results are for reference only and Blen is not responsible for outcomes.

section2.title: 2. Eligibility
section2.body1: Users must be at least 19 years old.

section3.title: 3. Registration
section3.note: Providing false information may restrict access.

section5.title: 5. User Content
section5.body1: Users may upload profile info, photos, messages, and survey responses.
section5.body2: Users retain rights but must not violate others.

section6.title: 6. AI Matching
section6.body1: Results are based on user data and are not guaranteed.

items.unused: Refund within 3 days if unused (subject to platform policy)

section10.title: 10. Restrictions
section10.body: Violation may result in suspension or termination.

section14.title: 14. Changes to Terms
section14.body: Terms may be updated with notice.

section15.title: 15. Governing Law
section15.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of South Korea.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.legalTitle: Privacy Policy (Collection and Use of Personal Information)

section1.title: 1. Categories of Personal Information Collected and Purpose of Use

required.info: Email address, nickname, date of birth, gender, IP address, device information, app usage history
required.purpose: User registration and management, identity verification, service security, and prevention of fraudulent or unauthorized use

optional.info: Profile photo, personality survey responses (values, preferences, etc.), matching-related data
optional.purpose: Providing AI-based personalized matching services, service personalization, and improvement

section2.title: 2. Collection and Use of Sensitive Information (Separate Consent Required)
section2.purpose: Purpose of Use: To enhance AI matching algorithms and provide more accurate profile matching services
section2.note: You have the right to refuse consent. However, if you refuse, matching features based on this information may be limited.

section3.title: 3. Retention and Use Period of Personal Information
section3.intro: In principle, personal information will be retained until the user withdraws membership and will be promptly destroyed thereafter. However, retain the following data according to applicable laws:

items.logs: Service usage records, access logs, and IP address: 3 months (Protection of Communications Secrets Act)
items.disputes: Records related to consumer complaints or dispute resolution: 3 years (E-commerce Act)

section4.title: 4. Right to Refuse Consent and Consequences
section4.intro: Users have the right to refuse consent to the collection and use of personal information. However:

items.required: Refusal to provide required information may restrict service use (e.g., account registration)
items.optional: Refusal to provide optional or sensitive information may limit personalized matching features

support.title: Customer Support
support.subtitle: If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact us anytime.

form.helperText: Click 'Send' to open your email and contact us.
form.requiredAlert: Please fill in all fields before sending.

relationshipTest.title: Romantic Relationship Tendency Test
relationshipTest.subtitle: What kind of personality is my best match?

aiChat.title: Blen AI
aiChat.subtitle: I will learn your dating style step by step
aiChat.firstMessage: Hi, welcome to Blen. Want to find your match with me?
aiChat.guidanceMessage: The more openly and in detail you share, the more accurately Blen AI can understand your dating style.
aiChat.finalAckMessage: Got it, I have enough context now. I will analyze your relationship style.
aiChat.reportReadyMessage: Thanks for sharing so openly. Your report is ready now.
prompts: What feels most important to you in a relationship these days?
Which money style feels easier for you: saving, spending, or balanced?
What is your daily rhythm like: active, relaxed, or work-focused?
How important is family context when you are dating someone?
When life gets busy, where does your heart lean: career, balance, or life-first?
How do you usually feel when the other person replies late?
When conflict happens, how do you usually respond first?
In love, what kind of side of you appears most often?
What is one value you definitely want to protect in a relationship?
And what is one pattern you absolutely cannot accept?
